commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an explicit ephemeral `model-run-<uuid>` session id/key to gateway `infer model run` calls and extends the CLI regression test to require fresh distinct session routing.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends gateway model-run RPCs without `sessionId` or `sessionKey`, and the gateway falls back omitted-session requests to the agent main session key. I did not run a live failing current-main gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed: the source PR is focused, proof is supplied, and this review found no narrow automated fix to request.
